englishDefinitions: Guides the viewer's attention to a particular part of an image, scene, or page.
Makes you look at something specific.
persianTranslation: چشم را به سمت چیزی هدایت می‌کند
examples: The bright red sign directs your eye to the entrance.
Good composition directs your eye across the whole image.
The camera movement directs your eye toward the main character.
